name: Giant Eagle

traits.name: Languages
traits.text: Celestial; understands Common and Primordial (Auran) but can't speak them

text:
# Giant Eagle

*Large Celestial, Neutral Good*

A noble, intelligent raptor that speaks its own tongue and remembers its friends.

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Radiant damage.
